questions.question: What is the full name of the patient/claimant?
What is {patient_name} date of birth? What is {patient_name} gender?
What is {patient_name} address or city of residence mentioned in the documents?
What is the date of the alleged injury or incident involving {patient_name}?
Where did the incident involving {patient_name} occur? (job site, address, employer location)
What was {patient_name} doing at the time of the incident? (job role, task)
Were there any witnesses to the incident involving {patient_name} mentioned in the documents?
What body parts of {patient_name} are claimed to be injured?
What is the nature of each claimed injury for {patient_name}? (fracture, tear, strain, herniation etc.)
Are any of {patient_name} injuries described as pre-existing or degenerative in any document?
